source.notes: Covers the pure prose-first close-loop helper: p3 active revelation deferral, p1 Not done fact lock, malformed nested chapter_status recovery, and hard-boundary advisory wording.

input.playerInput: I ask Slink what proof he has before we take the broker job.

narrator.prose: Slink keeps one palm on the locker seam and answers with the kind of care that means he has been waiting to be asked.

advisoryInput.playerInput: I ask Slink what proof he has before we take the broker job.
advisoryInput.recentProse: Slink answers the direct question and slides evidence across the berth table.
